misfires.prompt: I want to cache the resized image bytes in a distributed cache so I don't reprocess the sa
Change the JSON response formatting for my ASP.NET Core MVC controllers' HTTP responses.
Customize the packaged ABP Identity module without editing its source. Add a required Soci
Add a custom SocialSecurityNumber field to the installed ABP Identity module's user entity
In an ABP Angular app, add a lazy Books route to the sidebar with RoutesService, protect i

results.prompt: My Angular app at https://app.my-company.com and http://localhost:4200 get CORS errors calling my ABP API. Configure CORS on the API host to allow those origins plus any subdomain of my-company.com, with credentials, and place the middleware correctly.
After login my ABP app fails with an invalid redirect_uri and the login redirect is rejected. Fix the allowed redirect URIs for the OAuth client.
results.note: Route OAuth redirect URI to OpenIddict

results.prompt: In an ABP HTTP API host, register Swagger/OpenAPI and wire the Swagger UI to authenticate against the ABP auth server so the Authorize button gets a token. Hide ABP's built-in endpoints from the document.
Choose between query-string and URL-path API versioning for my auto controllers and attach versions to a conventional controller assembly.
results.note: Route API versioning strategy elsewhere

results.prompt: Create an ABP C# client module that calls IBookAppService on a remote BookStore service through a dynamic proxy. Register the contracts assembly under the BookStore endpoint, configure its BaseUrl, inject and call the service, and explain the fallback when that endpoint name is absent.
Expose my local BookAppService as conventional REST endpoints, customize its root path and controller name, and document the generated routes and HTTP verbs.
results.note: Route exposing local application services to HTTP APIs

results.prompt: Create src/HttpApi/BookStoreHttpApiModule.cs that exposes the BookStore application assembly through ABP conventional controllers. Summarize the registration and explain the default routes and verbs for GetAsync, GetListAsync, CreateAsync, UpdateAsync, and DeleteAsync.
Call an existing remote ABP catalog API from a C# application using a generated/static client proxy and a named remote endpoint configured with AbpRemoteServiceOptions.
results.note: Route remote API consumption to client proxies

results.prompt: In an ABP host, which built-in HTTP endpoint returns the current user's info and granted permissions for a custom client to consume? Give the route and verb, name the app service behind it, and list the main sections of what it returns (current user, granted policies, settings, features, multi-tenancy, timing).
In my Angular ABP app I need to read the granted permissions and current user on startup and react to them in components. How do I consume that application config on the client?
results.note: Route client-side config consumption to a UI skill

results.prompt: Add API versioning to my ABP auto (conventional) controllers, expose a v2 of one service, and pick a version reader that stays compatible with the generated static C# client proxies.
Register Swagger UI with OAuth against the auth server and hide ABP's built-in endpoints from the OpenAPI document.
results.note: Route Swagger document setup elsewhere

results.prompt: Configure ABP so changed roles and email claims apply without re-login. Show the authentication-server setting, middleware order, a full RemoteRefreshUrl for a separate MVC UI, and explain whether permission claims are refreshed by default.
Set the OpenIddict access-token and refresh-token lifetimes, require offline_access for refresh tokens, and replace development signing credentials with a production PFX.
results.note: Route token lifetime and certificates to OpenIddict

results.prompt: Configure an ABP AuthServer module for 30-minute access tokens and 14-day refresh tokens. Enable refresh tokens correctly for an MVC client, disable development certificates, load openiddict.pfx for signing and encryption, and keep HTTPS required outside development.

Make a user's changed roles and profile claims take effect on the next authenticated request without requiring login again. Wire the middleware in the right order and support a separate UI app calling the auth server refresh endpoint.
results.note: Route mid-session role refresh to dynamic claims

results.prompt: Configure an ABP API host as a resource server that validates OpenIddict tokens issued by a separate auth server, forwarding bearer authentication and wiring the validation middleware in the right pipeline position.
Configure the OpenIddict server: enable the authorization-code and client-credentials flows, register scopes, and set token lifetimes.
results.note: Route auth-server token issuance elsewhere

results.prompt: Implement admin-managed edit access for individual Document entities. Define the resource permission under Document's full type name and its management permission, then check Documents.Resources.Edit for the loaded document instance in an application service. Explain how the resource key is obtained.
Define global Books.Create, Books.Edit, and Books.Delete permissions, group and localize them, make Administration host-only, and protect BookAppService methods with Authorize attributes.
results.note: Route global permission definitions to named authorization

results.prompt: Create src/Application.Contracts/Permissions/BookStorePermissionDefinitionProvider.cs for a BookStore group with Books parent plus Create, Edit, and Delete children. Localize display names, make an Administration permission host-only, and show declarative protection on BookAppService.

Authorize editing one Document instance based on its id and owner, define a resource permission, and check the current user's grant for that exact document rather than a global Documents.Edit permission.
results.note: Route instance-specific access to resource authorization

results.prompt: I cloned an ABP solution and the MVC host reports that the Libs folder is missing. Give me the exact ABP CLI workflow to restore the web assets, then generate CSharp proxies into MyProxies/Inner from a running host at https://localhost:44302 without regenerating contracts. Also show how to invoke the classic CLI through the Studio CLI.
Upgrade my existing ABP solution to the latest version, align every Volo package, review breaking changes and migration guides, and verify the upgraded application.
results.note: Route a framework version migration to upgrade guidance

results.prompt: I'm starting a new ABP business app. Microservices might be needed later but not now. Which solution architecture and template should I create, and how do I keep a future microservice split cheap? I'll run the CLI afterward.
Give me the exact abp new command and its parameters to scaffold a layered Angular solution with MongoDB.
results.note: Route the abp new command syntax to the CLI skill

results.prompt: Create src/Application/Books/DeletedBookReader.cs that returns soft-deleted and active Books for one operation without changing the global default. Show how the filter state is scoped, checked, and restored, and explain physical deletion separately.
Run an operation as tenant A, then tenant B, using ICurrentTenant.Change and explain host context plus separate-database connection selection. Do not change query-filter defaults.
results.note: Route active tenant switching to multi-tenancy

results.prompt: Configure an ABP app so Identity and Permission Management share MySecondaryDb while the rest use Default. Bind ReportingDbContext to Reporting, use the async resolver API, and explain the resolution order for a tenant requesting a named connection when it has exact, mapped, and Default choices.
Register BookStoreDbContext with AddAbpDbContext, configure SQL Server through AbpDbContextOptions, map Book with IEntityTypeConfiguration, and enable default repositories.
results.note: Route DbContext provider setup to EF Core integration

results.prompt: Create src/EntityFrameworkCore/BookStoreDbContext.cs and src/EntityFrameworkCore/BookStoreEntityFrameworkCoreModule.cs for a Book aggregate. Use ABP conventions and register default repositories, including non-aggregate entities. Summarize the mapping and repository registration calls.
Replace EF Core with MongoDB for this ABP module. Define the Mongo DbContext collection mappings and register MongoDB repositories.
results.note: Route MongoDB persistence to its provider skill

results.prompt: Implement an ABP Book update flow where Book derives from AggregateRoot<Guid>. Include BookDto and UpdateBookDto, reject a stale second update, flush so the response carries the regenerated stamp, and explain who generates that stamp.
A worker already has an ambient unit of work. Start a new transaction for every tenant, commit each one independently, and make sure a failure in tenant B does not roll back tenant A.
results.note: Route transaction boundaries to unit of work management

results.prompt: Create src/Workers/TenantInvoiceProcessor.cs for code that already runs inside an ambient ABP unit of work but must commit each tenant independently. Use IUnitOfWorkManager correctly and explain requiresNew, transactional behavior, completion, and disposal on failure.
Return soft-deleted Books for one repository query, restore the previous filter state afterward, and show how to check whether ISoftDelete filtering is enabled.
results.note: Route soft-delete visibility to data filters

results.prompt: Create src/MongoDB/BookStoreMongoDbContext.cs and src/MongoDB/BookStoreMongoDbModule.cs for Book. Name its collection AppBooks, map it in CreateModel, register default repositories including all entities, and summarize why no EF migration is created.
Add an AbpDbContext<BookStoreDbContext>, configure Book with ConfigureByConvention and ToTable, register AddAbpDbContext, and create a dotnet ef migration.
results.note: Route relational migrations to EF Core

results.prompt: Create src/EntityFrameworkCore/BookSalesDapperRepository.cs for a hot aggregate query in an ABP EF Core app. It must use the current unit-of-work connection and transaction, support DI/interception, parameterize SQL, and explain how to see EF Core writes made earlier in the same unit of work.
Implement ordinary Book CRUD with LINQ filters, IncludeDetails, EF Core change tracking, entity mappings, and a migration. There is no measured SQL hot path requiring hand-written SQL.
results.note: Route ordinary tracked CRUD to EF Core integration

results.prompt: Create src/Data/BookStoreDataSeedContributor.cs that ABP discovers through DI. Seed one default Book idempotently in the DataSeedContext tenant, explain the host case, and show how the DbMigrator can pass AdminEmail and AdminPassword properties through IDataSeeder.
Add fixed lookup rows to an EF Core model with modelBuilder.Entity<Country>().HasData(...) and generate the database migration that inserts them.
results.note: Route schema migration seeding to EF Core integration

results.prompt: In a final (non-modular-library) ABP application's application service, load a Book aggregate by id and return 404 if it's missing, list books over a price with their chapters eager-loaded, and get the total count — without coupling the code to Entity Framework Core's async LINQ. Show the repository interface to inject.
Define a custom IBookRepository interface with a GetBooksByAuthor method and implement it against Entity Framework Core using the DbContext and DbSet.
results.note: Route custom repository implementation to ef-core-integration

results.prompt: Configure an ABP module to embed everything under MyResources, read /MyResources/js/site.js through the unified virtual file provider, override an upstream file at the exact same virtual path, and replace this module's embedded files with its physical folder only in Development.
Store user-uploaded profile photos in an Azure-backed, tenant-isolated container with save, nullable read, and delete operations. The files are runtime data, not assembly resources.
results.note: Route user uploads to BLOB storage

results.prompt: Implement a typed ABP BLOB container named profile-pictures, configure the file-system provider, and show save, nullable read, existence, and delete operations. Replacing an existing user's picture must be allowed, while tenant isolation remains enabled.
Embed a reusable module's CSS and localization JSON into its assembly, expose them under virtual paths, and override a depended module's CSS by registering the same virtual path.
results.note: Route embedded module assets to the virtual file system

results.prompt: Create a reusable ABP simple-state checker that disables a menu item in production. Implement ISimpleStateChecker<TState>, read IHostEnvironment from the checker context, and register it as a global checker for that state type.
Define a tenant feature value for MyModule and read its current value at runtime for the active edition.
results.note: Route feature value definition away

results.prompt: Configure ABP auditing to persist authenticated GET request logs, opt Book into entity change history while excluding Password changes, ignore /health URLs, and enrich each audit record with a custom claim. State the relevant defaults and storage requirement.
Create a retryable background job for invoice generation, enqueue it after an order event, and choose between a local event and a distributed event with outbox/inbox delivery.
results.note: Route background execution to jobs and events

results.prompt: Set up the ABP host Program.cs so the static bootstrap Serilog logger is created before building the host and the host is bridged to Serilog. Make sure HostAbortedException is rethrown instead of logged as fatal and buffered sinks are flushed.
Persist audit logs for entity changes and configure audit-log contributors and entity change history for my ABP app.
results.note: Route audit logging away

results.prompt: Create an ABP service that reversibly protects and unprotects a string using ABP's built-in encryption service. Inject the right abstraction and account for its null behavior.
Hash a user's password securely for login verification in my ABP identity setup.
results.note: Route password hashing away

results.prompt: In a ProductAppService create a new Product entity using an ABP-generated sequential GUID instead of Guid.NewGuid(), passing the id into the constructor before InsertAsync.
Build a distributed cache key and coordinate cache invalidation for my product entities in ABP.
results.note: Route cache key generation away

results.prompt: In my ABP module, configure a UTC clock policy so I can serve multiple timezones, and add a service that normalizes inbound DateTime values instead of calling DateTime.UtcNow directly.
I want to define the Abp.Timing.TimeZone setting and its value-provider hierarchy (default, tenant, user) for my application.
results.note: Define timezone setting value providers

results.prompt: Add ABP AI to my app module and pre-configure a default AI workspace so I can inject an IChatClient built from a ChatClientBuilder.
Configure OpenTelemetry traces and metrics exporters so I can observe my AI chat completion calls.
results.note: Configure OpenTelemetry traces for AI calls

results.prompt: Switch my ABP web host to use Autofac as the service provider so property injection and interceptors work. Show the module dependency and the host wiring in Program.cs.
My ABP interceptor isn't being invoked on a service method. Help me figure out the virtual/interface proxy rules so the interception fires.
results.note: Debug an interceptor not firing

results.prompt: Add a hidden-to-clients DefaultPageSize setting and a tenant PDFReporting toggle feature in ABP. Show their definition providers, read the setting, protect a virtual application-service method with RequiresFeature, and explain the setting and feature provider precedence plus what persists changed values.
Define Books.Create and Books.Delete rights, grant them to roles and users, and enforce them on BookAppService methods. This is about which users may act, not what a tenant subscription enables.
results.note: Route user authorization to permissions

results.prompt: In my ABP media module, compress an uploaded JPEG byte array using ABP's image abstractions with the ImageSharp provider, and handle the result state correctly.
I want to cache the resized image bytes in a distributed cache so I don't reprocess the same image on every request.
results.note: Cache processed image results

results.prompt: Enable ABP correlation id propagation in my ASP.NET Core app: add the middleware and configure the header name and whether it's echoed on the response.
Set up OpenTelemetry distributed tracing with span exporters and sampling for my ABP services.
results.note: Configure OpenTelemetry trace spans

results.prompt: In my ABP module's ConfigureServices, read the ExternalApi:Endpoint value from the host configuration the ABP way.
I need per-tenant and per-user values that admins can change at runtime, not appsettings values.
results.note: Route to settings for tenant overrides

results.prompt: In provider-independent ABP infrastructure code, serialize an object to JSON and deserialize it back, using ABP's abstraction and its camelCase/indented flags.
Change the JSON response formatting for my ASP.NET Core MVC controllers' HTTP responses.
results.note: Route to MVC formatter config

results.prompt: Define an ABP global feature for a payment capability and enable it once before application startup, then guard a controller behind it.
I need per-tenant and per-edition feature values gated with [RequiresFeature] that admins toggle per tenant.
results.note: Route to tenant features

results.prompt: In my ABP ProductAppService, I have a RefreshAsync method that loads a product from an IRepository and calls an external catalog API. Wire cooperative cancellation through the whole call chain the ABP way.
Configure my ABP background job worker's retry policy and how many times it re-executes on failure.
results.note: Route background job retry to sibling skill

results.prompt: In my ABP module, add a reusable execution-time interceptor that logs how long each intercepted service method takes, and register it so it only attaches to services I opt in via a marker interface.
I just want to replace an existing IInvoiceCalculator registration with my own implementation using [ExposeServices] and [Dependency]. No method interception needed.
results.note: Route plain service replacement to sibling skill

results.prompt: Design communication from Catalog to Ordering. Ordering needs immediate product details for one query, but stock changes should be propagated asynchronously and reliably. Define the integration-service boundary and an explicit stock-change ETO/handler, then configure an EF Core transactional outbox and inbox with idempotent handling.

Run existing ABP client proxies and distributed event handlers through Dapr service invocation and Dapr pub/sub. Configure Dapr app ids, the pubsub component, receive endpoints, and App API token validation.
results.note: Route Dapr sidecar transport setup to Dapr integration

results.prompt: Wire an ABP ASP.NET Core service to use Dapr for dynamic CSharp client-proxy invocation, publish and receive distributed events, and IAbpDistributedLock. The target app id is catalog-api, the pubsub component is pubsub, and the lock store is lockstore. Include the receive endpoints and App API token validation details.

Choose between synchronous integration services and asynchronous distributed events for two ABP services, define stable ETO contracts, and make delivery reliable with outbox/inbox and idempotent handlers. We have not selected Dapr or any other transport.
results.note: Route transport-independent communication design to microservice communication

results.prompt: Create src/Application/Invoices/InvoiceAppService.cs and describe its IInvoiceAppService contract for ApproveAsync. It must accept and return DTOs, load the aggregate through a repository, invoke domain behavior, and map the result without exposing entities.
Build a full standard-key Book ICrudAppService and CrudAppService with distinct get/list/create/update DTOs, all five policy names, filtering, sorting, paging, and mapping paths.
results.note: Route standard CRUD pipeline to the dedicated skill

results.prompt: Design the ABP application contract and service for Book with distinct detail, list, create, and update DTOs. Explain the generic base types, repository dependency, mappings, and authorization policy properties.
Implement an ApproveInvoiceAsync command that validates a pending invoice, invokes domain behavior, publishes an event, and returns a result. This is not a get/list/create/update/delete resource.
results.note: Route workflow command away from CRUD skill

results.prompt: Add runtime plug-ins to an ABP ASP.NET Core host. Load module DLLs recursively from a PlugIns folder through the AddApplicationAsync options callback, and show the minimum plug-in module class. The host must not take a compile-time reference to the plug-in assembly.

Create a normal reusable Inventory module that is referenced at compile time, derives from AbpModule, declares DependsOn dependencies, and registers services in ConfigureServices. It is not loaded from a DLL folder.
results.note: Route an ordinary referenced module to module definition

results.prompt: Customize the packaged ABP Identity module without editing its source. Add a required SocialSecurityNumber to IdentityUser plus create, update, and output DTOs, map it to a 64-character EF Core column, and replace IIdentityUserAppService by inheriting IdentityUserAppService while keeping every expected injection path working.
Build a new reusable Payments module from scratch with its own AbpModule class, DependsOn dependencies, options, and startup hook. No pre-built module is being overridden.
results.note: Route a brand-new module class to module definition

results.prompt: Create src/BlogModule.cs for an ABP module that directly depends on AbpAutofacModule and AbpAspNetCoreMvcModule, configures BlogOptions, conventionally registers BlogIndexer as scoped, and resolves it during application initialization. Explain when PreConfigureServices runs relative to ConfigureServices across modules.
Tell me which projects should contain a Book aggregate, IBookRepository, BookDto, BookAppService, EfCoreBookRepository, HTTP controller, and client proxy in a layered ABP solution.
results.note: Route project placement to layered architecture

results.prompt: Add a runtime-defined ManufacturerCode extra property to my own Product aggregate root and its ProductDto, persist it with EF Core, and map it between entity and DTO.
Add a custom SocialSecurityNumber field to the installed ABP Identity module's user entity and surface it on the Identity UI.
results.note: Route pre-built module extension to sibling skill

results.prompt: Create src/Application.Contracts/Books/CreateBookDto.cs with required name, bounded length, positive price, and a cross-field rule. Explain when ABP validates it, the interception requirement for a custom IValidationEnabled service, and the HTTP response on failure.
Define Books.Create and Books.Delete permissions in a PermissionDefinitionProvider, localize their display names, protect application-service methods with [Authorize], and explain role grants.
results.note: Route authorization policy work away from error handling

results.prompt: Design the project placement for a layered ABP Order module. Place Order, IOrderRepository, OrderManager, OrderDto, IOrderAppService, OrderAppService, EfCoreOrderRepository, OrderController, and the C# client proxy in the correct projects, and explain the allowed reference direction.
Create BlogApplicationModule.cs with AbpModule, DependsOn, ConfigureServices option registration, and an OnApplicationInitialization hook.
results.note: Route module dependency wiring to module definition

results.prompt: Add framework-level localization to my ABP module: define a localization resource, register it with virtual json files per culture, inherit keys from a shared resource, and consume it from an application service. Also localize a business exception's error code.
Add a top-level navigation menu item with an icon and a required permission using IMenuContributor.
results.note: Route navigation menu items elsewhere

results.prompt: Create src/Application/BookStoreApplicationAutoMapperProfile.cs and show module registration plus application code that maps Book to BookDto and UpdateBookDto onto an existing Book. Both types are extensible, so carry ExtraProperties and validate the profile at startup.
Add SocialSecurityNumber to the pre-built IdentityUser entity, its create/update/output DTOs, a dedicated EF Core column, and the generated module UI without editing the Identity module source.
results.note: Route adding Identity extra properties to module customization

results.prompt: Create src/Domain/Orders/Order.cs for an ABP Order aggregate. Generate its Guid outside the aggregate with IGuidGenerator, keep setters non-public, mutate lines through aggregate methods, reference Product by ProductId, and raise a local OrderCompletedEvent when completed. Explain the AggregateRoot<Guid> facilities used.
Configure BookStoreDbContext with ConfigureByConvention, table mappings, indexes, AddAbpDbContext, default repositories, and an EF Core migration.
results.note: Route EF persistence mapping away from domain modeling

results.prompt: In my ABP module I want to replace the existing IInvoiceCalculator registration with a DiscountInvoiceCalculator, keeping the same lifetime, without editing the original module.
I want to add a custom cross-cutting interceptor that wraps my ABP service methods with before/after logging using the dynamic proxy.
results.note: Route method interception to sibling skill

results.prompt: Explain the difference between CurrentTenant.Change(null), CurrentTenant.Change(tenantId), and disabling the IMultiTenant data filter. Include the separate-database limitation.
Configure a global Default connection string, a module-specific AbpIdentity connection string, database mappings, and a per-tenant fallback order.
results.note: Route connection-string configuration to its sibling skill

results.prompt: Add an authorized ABP SignalR ChatHub with a strongly typed client, CurrentUser access, and private delivery through Clients.User. Show the conventional route and a JavaScript client connection. Keep automatic DI registration and endpoint mapping.
Expose a non-realtime Books application service as conventional REST endpoints with correct HTTP verbs and OpenAPI metadata. No server push, hub, or persistent client connection is needed.
results.note: Route a normal request-response API to HTTP API guidance

results.prompt: Create src/BackgroundJobs/GenerateInvoicePdfJob.cs and show how an application service queues it for 30 seconds later with high priority. Use ABP's async job base and explain retry/storage expectations for production.
Ensure only one application instance rebuilds a shared cache at a time. Acquire an IAbpDistributedLock with a timeout and use a typed distributed cache for the result.
results.note: Route cross-instance exclusion to distributed locking

results.prompt: Configure ABP to cache Product entities as ProductDto by Guid, use a 30-minute sliding expiration, and implement a batch lookup that preserves cache-aware loading. Explain what happens after a Product update or delete and which generic cache type the consumer injects.

Cache an expensive report under an arbitrary string key with GetOrAddAsync and acquire a distributed lock named nightly-report across service instances. This cache is not tied to an entity repository.
results.note: Route arbitrary key-value caching and locking to distributed infrastructure

results.prompt: Configure AppUrlOptions for an MVC application with a tenant-aware RootUrl and a named PasswordReset URL, then resolve the absolute link through IAppUrlProvider inside an email link factory.
Configure the base address for a remote HTTP service client and set AbpRemoteServiceOptions.BaseUrl so my app service proxy can call the backend API.
results.note: Route remote service base address away

results.prompt: I'm deploying an ABP app as multiple instances behind an nginx reverse proxy. Cover forwarded headers, sharing Data Protection keys across instances, moving cache/lock to a distributed provider, and making sure background jobs/workers don't run duplicated on every instance.
Show me how to cache a value with IDistributedCache<T> and acquire a distributed lock with IAbpDistributedLock in my service code.
results.note: Route distributed cache/lock mechanics elsewhere

results.prompt: Implement an ABP application service that caches ProductCacheItem values for 30 minutes in a typed distributed cache and a report generator that only one application instance can enter at a time. Use the ABP cache and distributed-lock abstractions, handle a failed lock acquisition, and release the handle correctly.
Cache ProductDto by Product Guid using the repository-backed ABP entity cache, batch several ids, and automatically invalidate cached values when Product is updated or deleted.
results.note: Route automatic entity-by-id caching to entity cache

results.prompt: In ABP, define a localized Scriban PasswordReset text template stored in the virtual file system at /Demos/PasswordReset/PasswordReset.tpl, then render it to a string with a model and a specific culture. Include the template engine choice and the embedded virtual-file registration. I only need the rendered string, not sending it anywhere.
I already have the rendered HTML body string. Send it as an email to a user and queue it so the request isn't blocked, using the provider-independent ABP email API.
results.note: Route email delivery to send-emails

results.prompt: Configure ABP MVC automatic antiforgery validation in my host module and add an endpoint that issues the CSRF token cookie for a JavaScript client.
Set up OpenIddict token issuance and bearer authentication for my API.
results.note: Route to OpenIddict for API auth

results.prompt: In ABP, send an HTML email with a CC and a PDF attachment, and also queue an email so the web request isn't blocked, without coupling the application service to MailKit. Then show how to switch the SMTP provider to MailKit with the right TLS mode.
Define a Scriban text template in ABP and render it to a string with a model. I'm not sending anything yet, I just need the rendered content.
results.note: Route template definition/rendering to render-text-templates

results.prompt: Send a verification code text message to a phone number from an ABP application service, keeping the code provider-independent.
Render and send a templated email confirmation to a user in ABP.
results.note: Route to email skill

results.prompt: Implement an ABP application service that caches ProductCacheItem values in a two-tier cache (fast in-memory L1 plus a shared distributed L2) so frequent reads are served locally and the L2 is the source of truth on a miss, and so concurrent cache misses for the same id only run the factory once. Expire entries after 30 minutes using the ABP hybrid cache abstraction.

I just need a plain typed distributed cache for CountryCacheItem backed by Redis, using GetOrAddAsync to return a cached value or compute it on a miss. I do not need any local in-memory tier. Which ABP abstraction should I use?
results.note: Plain single-tier distributed cache routes elsewhere

results.prompt: Create test/Application/IssueAppService_Tests.cs as an abstract ABP application test and describe the concrete EF Core and MongoDB subclasses. Resolve the real app service, query seeded data, and explain when WithUnitOfWorkAsync is required.
Configure production HTTP transaction defaults with AbpUnitOfWorkDefaultOptions, add a requiresNew transactional scope in a background job, and explain CompleteAsync and SaveChangesAsync semantics.
results.note: Route production UOW policy away from testing

results.prompt: Write a Vitest unit test for an ABP Angular standalone BooksComponent. Boot a TestBed with ABP's testing modules so nothing hits a backend, mock AuthService, and clean up modal DOM between tests.
Write an integration test for my ABP BookAppService that resolves the real service and asserts against seeded data through the *TestBase chain.
results.note: Route server-side test to test-abp-applications

results.prompt: Write an ABP MVC/Razor integration test base and a test that requests the welcome page over HTTP and asserts on the HTML. Explain how the web test module and the response helpers are set up.
Write an integration test for my ABP BookAppService that resolves the real service and asserts on seeded data — no web host.
results.note: Route app-service test to test-abp-applications

results.prompt: Show the ABP Angular workflow for a Books feature. Generate typed proxies from a running backend, inject the generated BookService, guard optional list items, add a localized menu route through RoutesService, and gate the create button by BookStore.Books.Create. Also give the distinct proxy command for an ng-packs NX workspace.
I changed a DTO on my ABP backend. Regenerate just the Angular service and model proxies — only the generation step, nothing about consuming them.
results.note: Route pure Angular proxy generation to the CLI

results.prompt: Create Pages/Books.razor for an ABP Blazor UI. Derive its code-behind from the correct ABP component base, set MyProjectResource for L, inject IBookAppService, load books asynchronously, and show the current user's name. Keep it compatible with both in-process Server resolution and WebAssembly HTTP client proxies.
Generate Angular proxies for the running backend, inject BookService into a component, add a Books menu route with RoutesService, and hide the create button with the abpPermission directive.
results.note: Route an Angular proxy and menu page to Angular UI

results.prompt: Build an ABP Angular BooksComponent that shows a server-side paged, sortable, searchable list from BookService.getList, and refreshes after a delete. Handle loading state and the total count the ABP way, and make sure the query state doesn't leak when leaving the page.
I changed a DTO on my ABP backend. Regenerate just the Angular service and model proxies — only the generation step.
results.note: Route proxy generation to abp-cli-commands

results.prompt: Create an ABP MVC widget for a dashboard counter: a view component marked as a widget that declares its own script and style files, requires a permission, and can be server-refreshed. Explain how a consumer places and refreshes it.
Replace the Identity module's built-in user management page with my own page while keeping the module upgradeable.
results.note: Route module UI overriding elsewhere

results.prompt: In an ABP Angular app, add a custom 'Name' column after userName and a 'Say Hi' row action to the shipped Identity users page, then register the contributors. Don't fork the module.
Build a paged, searchable Angular list page for my own Books feature backed by BookService.getList.
results.note: Route own-feature list to build-angular-lists-and-forms

results.prompt: In an ABP app, add a custom element into the layout's <head> and a button into the global application toolbar, without copying the theme's layout file. Cover both the MVC and Blazor mechanisms.
Add a new top-level navigation menu item with a required permission using IMenuContributor.
results.note: Route menu contribution elsewhere

results.prompt: Add a Books item to the ABP main navigation menu, ordered before default order, visible only when BookStore.Books is granted. Define MyProjectResource, register its virtual JSON resource, and show matching en.json and de.json entries for Menu:Books plus CSharp consumption through L.

In an ABP Angular app, add a lazy Books route to the sidebar with RoutesService, protect it with requiredPolicy, and render ::Menu:Books through the abpLocalization pipe. The server localization resource already exists.
results.note: Route Angular-specific route and pipe wiring to Angular UI

results.prompt: Create Pages/Books/CreateModal.cshtml, Pages/Books/CreateModal.cshtml.cs, and Pages/Books/Index.cshtml.js for an ABP MVC UI. Use an AbpPageModel, an abp-dynamic-form around the complete modal, and abp.ModalManager with an onResult reload. Avoid nested forms.
Build an interactive Blazor Web App component for editing Books with EditForm, validation, streaming rendering, and InteractiveServer render mode.
results.note: Route an interactive component to Blazor

results.prompt: In an ABP MVC/Razor Pages app, call the server BookAppService.getList from browser JavaScript and bind the results to an ABP DataTable with server-side paging, sorting, and a delete row action. Explain how the proxy is loaded and how paging/sorting is adapted.
From a C# background service, call a remote ABP HTTP API using a strongly-typed client proxy with retry via AbpHttpClientBuilderOptions.
results.note: Route C# client proxy consumption elsewhere

results.prompt: Plan an upgrade of an existing ABP solution that is several minor versions behind and must cross one major-version boundary to reach a prerelease target. Include the ordered version hops, the classic CLI update command, migration guides, database/client follow-up, validation, and rollback.
Create a brand-new ABP layered application named Acme.BookStore and explain the relevant abp new options. There is no existing solution to upgrade.
results.note: Route new solution creation to CLI command guidance
